heading: Assistant Secretary of State for Verification and Compliance
label: 2652c Assistant Secretary of State for Verification and Compliance

children.heading: Designation of position
children.label: a Designation of position
children.text: The Secretary of State shall designate one of the Assistant Secretaries of State authorized by as the Assistant Secretary of State for Verification and Compliance. The Assistant Secretary shall report to the Under Secretary of State for Arms Control and International Security.section 2651a(c)(1) of this title

children.heading: Directive governing the Assistant Secretary of State
children.label: b Directive governing the Assistant Secretary of State

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Not later than 30 days after , the Secretary of State shall issue a directive governing the position of the Assistant Secretary.November 29, 1999

children.label: A
children.text: the duties of the Assistant Secretary;

children.label: B
children.text: the relationships between the Assistant Secretary and other officials of the Department of State;

children.label: C
children.text: any delegation of authority from the Secretary of State to the Assistant Secretary; and

children.label: D
children.text: such matters as the Secretary considers appropriate.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Assistant Secretary shall have as his principal responsibility the overall supervision (including oversight of policy and resources) within the Department of State of all matters relating to verification and compliance with international arms control, nonproliferation, and disarmament agreements or commitments.

children.heading: Primary role
children.label: A Primary role
children.text: Except as provided in subparagraphs (B) and (C), the Assistant Secretary, or his designee, shall participate in all interagency groups or organizations within the executive branch of Government that assess, analyze, or review United States planned or ongoing policies, programs, or actions that have a direct bearing on verification or compliance matters, including interagency intelligence committees concerned with the development or exploitation of measurement or signals intelligence or other national technical means of verification.

children.heading: Requirement for designation
children.label: B Requirement for designation
children.text: Subparagraph (A) shall not apply to groups or organizations on which the Secretary of State or the Undersecretary of State for Arms Control and International Security sits, unless such official designates the Assistant Secretary to attend in his stead.

children.heading: Waiver by President
children.label: i Waiver by President
children.text: The President may waive the provisions of subparagraph (A) if inclusion of the Assistant Secretary would not be in the national security interests of the United States.

children.heading: Waiver by others
children.label: ii Waiver by others
children.text: With respect to an interagency group or organization, or meeting thereof, working with exceptionally sensitive information contained in compartments under the control of the Director of Central Intelligence, the Secretary of Defense, or the Secretary of Energy, such Director or Secretary, as the case may be, may waive the provision of subparagraph (A) if inclusion of the Assistant Secretary would not be in the national security interests of the United States.

children.heading: Transmission of waiver to Congress
children.label: iii Transmission of waiver to Congress
children.text: Any waiver of participation under clause (i) or (ii) shall be transmitted in writing to the appropriate committees of Congress.

children.heading: Relationship to the intelligence community
children.label: 3 Relationship to the intelligence community
children.text: The Assistant Secretary shall be the principal policy community representative to the intelligence community on verification and compliance matters.

children.label: A
children.text: all reports required pursuant to ;section 2577 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: so much of the report required under paragraphs (4) through (6) of as relates to verification or compliance matters;section 2593a(a) of this title

children.label: C
children.text: so much of the reports required under as relates to verification or compliance matters; andsection 8003 of this title

children.label: D
children.text: other reports being prepared by the Department of State as of , relating to arms control, nonproliferation, or disarmament verification or compliance matters.November 29, 1999
